Language.CobOutputBarcodeRect_item_4: Output Four Corner Points + Center Point

Language.GrbBarcodeIDAndEof: Code ID and End of Data

Language.ChbExtraTrig: Enable External IO Trigger(Reboot to Effect)

Language.LabMB_Tips: Note: Take effect after device reboot.

Language.LabEtherNetTips_2: (Some models may not support these protocols)

Language.LabEtherNetTips_1: Note: Take effect after device reboot.

Language.LabMcPLCTips: Note: Take effect after device reboot

Language.LabNetWorkSettingTips: Note: Take effect after device reboot.

Language.LabTips1: Note: Take the box in front indicates the group to activate.

MsgContent.ContentText: The Template Name Contains Illegal Characters, Please Re-enter.
Please operate after selected com port!
Please enter the correct com port
Please enter the correct remote IP
please enter the correct remote port
Please enter the correct Hex characters, such as“0A”“0x0a”
Please enter the data to be sent first！
Do you want to clear received data?
Do you want to clear received byte count？
Do you want to clear sent data?
Do you want to clear sent byte count？
Keep power on in case errors!
Failed to convert to a string
The number of rows or columns is incorrect. Please check and try again
The number of ROI cannot exceed 20
The current ROI has not been saved, are you sure you want to exit?
To draw multiple ROI, you need to capture an image first, please check and try again
The configuration file format required for program running is incorrect, causing the program to fail to run properly.
This function cannot be set by command
Please connect the device before sending the command
Are you sure you want to save the current configuration? This action cannot be undone
Format error, data is not saved.
The specified key already exists, and the entered data is not saved.

The command configuration is triggered continuously. The command configuration may fail, but the command configuration is usually successful. To ensure that the message indicating success is correct, switch back to external triggering or obtain the original image to suspend data sending, and then run the configuration command.
Need to be configured in external trigger mode!
The installation is incomplete. Exit now to stop the installation. Click "OK" to exit the installation.
